# ResumeVault
> AI resume builder for job seekers. Paste a job description and get a polished, tailored resume in seconds.

## What this site does
ResumeVault uses AI to generate a perfectly tailored resume from a job description. Paste the job posting, provide your experience, and the AI writes a professional resume optimised for that specific role — including the right keywords for applicant tracking systems (ATS). Also includes AI interview prep.

## Who it's for
Job seekers at all career stages — graduates, mid-career professionals, and senior executives. Works across all industries and job types.

## Key features
- AI resume generation from job descriptions
- ATS keyword optimisation built in
- Interview prep mode — AI practice questions per role
- Multiple professional templates
- Download as PDF or Word
- Cover letter generator

## Pricing
Free tier available — generate up to 3 resumes per month. Pro plan from $7.99/month for unlimited resumes.

## Contact
https://resumevault.app
